args.code: (() => { let t=null; document.querySelectorAll('main,[role="main"],div,section').forEach((el)=>{ const oy=getComputedStyle(el).overflowY; if((oy==='auto'||oy==='scroll') && el.scrollHeight>el.clientHeight+20){ if(!t||el.clientHeight>t.clientHeight) t=el; } }); if(t){ t.scrollBy(0, t.clientHeight); return JSON.stringify({picked:t.tagName, top:t.scrollTop, sh:t.scrollHeight}); } window.scrollBy(0,window.innerHeight); return JSON.stringify({picked:'window'}); })()
